page_availability.details: All 16 sitemap URLs return HTTP 200. No 404s, 500s, or redirect loops detected.

issues.issue: og:image missing width and height dimensions
issues.detail: All pages use og:image pointing to https://a290.wiki/images/a290-hero.png but do not include og:image:width or og:image:height meta tags. This prevents social platforms from pre-sizing the image correctly, which can slow down page rendering on Facebook, LinkedIn, and other OG-consuming platforms.

details.title_tags: All 16 pages have <title> tags. Titles are unique and descriptive.
details.meta_description: All 16 pages have meta name=description tags. All descriptions are unique and within acceptable length (under 160 chars).
details.og_tags: All 16 pages have og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type (website), og:url, og:site_name.
details.twitter_tags: All 16 pages have twitter:card (summary_large_image), twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image.
details.canonical: All 16 pages have self-referencing canonical URLs.
details.hreflang: All 16 pages have complete hreflang pairs: en, fr, and x-default. Cross-references are correct (EN pages point to FR, FR pages point to EN).
details.robots_txt: Present and correct: allows all bots, references sitemap.
details.sitemap: Present with 16 URLs (8 EN + 8 FR), consistent with actual page count.

image_alt.details: All tags found in the HTML have alt attributes. No images missing alt text detected. Alt text quality is good — descriptive and not keyword-stuffed.
image_alt.note: No images found in /fr/communities/ page (no images on that page, which is expected for a community links page).

issues.issue: External link with rel=noopener not found on /fr/communities/
issues.detail: The French communities page links to external Facebook groups and forums. These external links should be reviewed to ensure they all have target="_blank" and rel="noopener" for security.

details.navigation: All internal links resolve to existing pages. Anchor links (e.g. #charging, #app-setup) are in-page targets, not broken links.

issues.detail: Most pages only include BreadcrumbList structured data. Only /accessories/ and /troubleshooting/ include FAQPage structured data. Other topic pages (Prospective Owner, New Owner, How To, Reference) could benefit from FAQPage or Article schema to potentially earn rich snippets in search results.

details.breadcrumb_list: Present on all 16 pages with correct pathing.
details.website_schema: Present on /index.html (EN home) with WebSite schema (name, url, description, inLanguage).
details.recommendation: Consider adding FAQPage schema to /prospective-owner/, /new-owner/, /how-to/, and /reference/ pages where FAQ-style content exists.

issues.issue: Thin page content on some pages
issues.detail: /communities/ is 4465 bytes (EN) and /fr/communities/ is 4482 bytes (FR). These are the smallest pages and contain primarily external links with minimal original content. While not critically thin, Google may view these as low-value pages. Consider adding more descriptive content about each community.
Cloudflare Web Analytics script is loaded on all pages. This is acceptable for analytics but consider async/defer loading if page speed is a concern.
No <link rel=icon> or <link rel=apple-touch-icon> tags found in any HTML. Consider adding favicon for better browser bookmark appearance and CTR in search results.

details.viewport: All pages have proper viewport meta tag
details.lang_attributes: All pages have correct lang attribute (en or fr)
details.html_validation: All pages use valid HTML5 structure

strengths: All pages return HTTP 200 — zero broken URLs
Complete meta tag coverage on all pages (title, description, OG, Twitter, canonical)
Proper hreflang implementation with en/fr/x-default pairs on all pages
All images have descriptive alt text
Robots.txt correctly configured with sitemap reference
JSON-LD structured data present (BreadcrumbList on all pages, FAQPage on select pages)
Unique and descriptive titles and meta descriptions on every page
Consistent bilingual structure (EN + FR) across all sections

recommendations.action: Add og:image:width and og:image:height meta tags
recommendations.impact: Improves social sharing rendering speed on Facebook/LinkedIn

recommendations.action: Add structured data to additional pages (FAQPage or Article schema)
recommendations.impact: Could earn rich snippets for more pages in search results
Better bookmark appearance and browser UI
Reduces thin content risk, improves SEO value of those pages
